items.title_en: SpaceX stock sinks 5%, losing momentum after a multiday rally
items.title_zh: SpaceX 股价下跌 5%，在多日上涨后失去动力
items.desc_en: Elon Musk's space and AI company has seen its stock surge since its blockbuster IPO on Friday.
items.desc_zh: 埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 的太空和人工智能公司自上周五大规模首次公开募股以来，其股价大幅上涨。

items.title_en: Target, Walmart and Amazon among brands losing LGBTQ+ consumer spending, new survey says
items.title_zh: 新调查显示塔吉特、沃尔玛和亚马逊等品牌正在失去 LGBTQ+ 消费者支出
items.desc_en: LGBTQ+ consumers are shifting spending toward companies they view as supporting DEI and away from those seen as retreating, HRC survey finds.
items.desc_zh: HRC 调查发现，LGBTQ+ 消费者正在将支出转向他们认为支持 DEI 的公司，而不是那些被视为撤退的公司。

items.title_en: Dow rises to record as oil ticks higher, traders await Fed rate decision: Live updates
items.title_zh: 随着油价走高，道琼斯指数升至历史新高，交易员等待美联储利率决定：实时更新
items.desc_en: Wednesday's FOMC decision marks the first with new Fed Chairman Kevin Warsh at the helm of the U.S. central bank.
items.desc_zh: 周三的联邦公开市场委员会 (FOMC) 决定标志着新任美联储主席凯文·沃什 (Kevin Warsh) 执掌美联储后的首次决定。

items.title_en: The private space race is spurring a luxury hotel land grab for Florida oceanfront property
items.title_zh: 私人太空竞赛正在刺激豪华酒店争夺佛罗里达海滨地产的土地
items.desc_en: The rise of the private space industry, with companies like SpaceX and Blue Origin, has spurred demand for commercial real estate on Florida's space coast.
items.desc_zh: SpaceX 和 Blue Origin 等公司的兴起，刺激了佛罗里达州太空海岸商业地产的需求。

items.title_en: Nigerian man jailed for storing human faeces outside his home
items.title_zh: 尼日利亚男子因在家外储存人类粪便而被判入狱
items.desc_en: Neighbours said the stench from the property had become so overwhelming that it was impossible to relax at home.
items.desc_zh: 邻居们表示，房子里的恶臭太严重了，根本不可能在家里放松。

items.title_en: The broadening stock market trade: What to buy outside AI
items.title_zh: 不断扩大的股市交易：在人工智能之外该买什么
items.desc_en: Artificial intelligence has been the driving force for the stock market since late 2022, with investors looking for exposure to the emerging technology.
items.desc_zh: 自 2022 年底以来，人工智能一直是股市的驱动力，投资者纷纷寻求接触这一新兴技术。

items.title_en: Iran sends tankers loaded with oil past US military blockade
items.title_zh: 伊朗派遣满载石油的油轮突破美国军事封锁
items.desc_en: Three Iranian tankers loaded with crude oil have passed the US blockade line in the Gulf of Oman, ship-tracking data shows.
items.desc_zh: 船舶跟踪数据显示，三艘满载原油的伊朗油轮已通过美国在阿曼湾的封锁线。

items.title_en: CME Group's Terry Duffy to step down in 2027, CFO Lynne Fitzpatrick to become CEO
items.title_zh: 芝商所 (CME) 特里·达菲 (Terry Duffy) 将于 2027 年辞职，首席财务官林恩·菲茨帕特里克 (Lynne Fitzpatrick) 将出任首席执行官
items.desc_en: Duffy, 67, will transition to executive chairman effective March 1, 2027, the company said Wednesday.
items.desc_zh: 该公司周三表示，现年 67 岁的达菲将于 2027 年 3 月 1 日起担任执行董事长。

items.title_en: Fed meeting live updates: Here's everything to expect from Kevin Warsh's first rate decision

items.desc_zh: 美联储周三的利率决定是凯文·沃什 (Kevin Warsh) 掌舵的第一个利率决定。

items.title_en: 'Passive' investors who dodged bitcoin are now forced to own SpaceX, which is three times more volatile
items.title_zh: 躲避比特币的“被动”投资者现在被迫拥有 SpaceX，该公司的波动性是其三倍

items.desc_zh: 许多顾问和资金经理投资了指数基金，这些基金很快将成为埃隆·马斯克天文野心的所有者

items.title_en: Carvana’s new vehicle strategy turns dealership into ‘playground,’ test-drive center with sales all online
items.title_zh: Carvana的新车战略将经销店变成“游乐场”、试驾中心，销售全部在线进行

items.desc_zh: 但不要指望 Carvana 会在其七家 Stellantis 商店之一向您出售车辆，这与典型的特许经销商形成鲜明对比。

items.title_en: Anthropic asked for regulation. Washington went much further

items.desc_zh: 警察开枪射杀 1 岁的科恩·威利 (Kohen Wiley)，塞纳托比亚 (Senatobia) 爆发抗议活动 localmemphis.com 警察在塞纳托比亚沃尔玛 (Senatobia Walmart) 开枪射击，造成一名儿童死亡，其中一人伤重 WREG.com

items.title_en: 'We fear for our lives' - deadline looms for migrants to leave South Africa

items.desc_en: Protesters have set 30 June as the date for all undocumented migrants to leave the country.
items.desc_zh: 抗议者将 6 月 30 日定为所有无证移民离开该国的日期。

items.title_en: Group planned to attack White House UFC event using snipers and drones, FBI says

items.desc_en: In newly unsealed court filings, the government says the group allegedly expressed grievances about corruption, the Epstein files, and data centres.
items.desc_zh: 在新公布的法庭文件中，政府表示，该组织据称对腐败、爱泼斯坦档案和数据中心表示不满。

items.title_en: EU orders Meta to open WhatsApp to rival AI chatbots
items.title_zh: 欧盟命令 Meta 向人工智能聊天机器人开放 WhatsApp
items.desc_en: Meta has accused the EU of "regulatory overreach" and says its decision will allow tech giants like OpenAI free access to WhatsApp.
items.desc_zh: Meta 指责欧盟“监管越权”，并表示其决定将允许 OpenAI 等科技巨头免费使用 WhatsApp。
